title: goeppertia lindmanii
intro: Goeppertia lindmanii, also known as Lindman's calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goeppertia lindmanii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in tincture form.
